title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Kraken wins $22M arbitration against former auditor Mazars
summary: The crypto exchange's parent company says Mazars' withdrawal from its 2022 audit caused millions in damages and tied the dispute to Operation Chokepoint 2.0.

title: Chip Stocks Sink After Blistering Run as Oil Jumps: Markets Wrap
summary: Wall Street was rattled by a selloff in chipmakers on concerns over whether massive artificial-intelligence investments will justify lofty valuations while a jump in oil prices boosted bond yields.

title: Traders Hedge for Less Hawkish Fed as Hikes Remain Priced In
summary: Options traders are increasing bets that the broader market is overestimating how much the Federal Reserve will raise interest rates this year.

title: Polymarket Turns On Instant Bitcoin Deposits Via Lightning Network, Powered by Spark
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Polymarket Turns On Instant Bitcoin Deposits Via Lightning Network, Powered by Spark
Polymarket has enabled instant self-custodial Bitcoin deposits via the Lightning Network using Spark.
This post Polymarket Turns On Instant Bitcoin Deposits Via Lightning Network, Powered by Spark

title: Kraken Seeks Final Judgment After $22 Million Award Against Former Auditor
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Kraken Seeks Final Judgment After $22 Million Award Against Former Auditor
Kraken is seeking a final Delaware court judgment against former auditor Mazars after winning a $22 million arbitration award, arguing the firm's abrupt resignation during heightened U.S. regulatory pressure

title: BIG3 NFT Buyers Sue Ice Cube's Basketball League Over Alleged Unfulfilled Promises
summary: Investors who purchased BIG3 NFTs expected the perks of team ownership, but allege "deceptive, fraudulent" marketing was at play.

title: China May Be Following US Lead With Quiet Crackdown on AI Exports
summary: China is reportedly building the same power to cut off its AI that the US deployed against Anthropic in June.

title: ZEC jumps 12% as Zcash nears mathematical proof against hidden counterfeit bugs
summary: Project Tachyon outlined new details of its verification effort for Zcash's upcoming Ironwood shielded pool.

title: SBI Holdings is sole investor in crypto platform EDX Markets’ $76 million Series C
summary: Institutional crypto platform EDX Markets has closed a $76 million Series C funding round, with Japan's SBI Holdings as the sole investor.

title: French far-right leader Marine Le Pen says she will run for president
summary: Politician sets up unprecedented election campaign next year after judges uphold her conviction for embezzlement

title: Trump signals reversal of Turkey F-35 ban
summary: US president strikes friendlier tone with Turkish counterpart than Nato allies
